Review from Yelp ★★★★★ "Wow, just wow! I read the reviews to see if it was worth the drive since I'm only in this area for a couple of hours on business. Everyone always mentions something nice about Carol the owner ---- and they ARE SPOT ON! From the moment I walked in I felt like I was someone special. So many fibers to..." Read More David G. Review from Yelp ★★★★★ "I am not a crafty nor a needlepoint kind of guy. My experience with Garden Gate is solely with the owner Carole R. Carole is a member of BSF International, and has made her shop available for other members to acquire the printed materials needed for the year-long study, AND at an extremely fair price point. It was a ..." Read More Trixi C. Review from Yelp ★★★★★ "It is too bad there is no picture of the shop or the owner. This has been my home away from home! Carol, the owner, is a delight and loved by all! Her teachers are fabulous and so is her finisher. I have been driving to this place for classes from Mission Viejo for years. They have lots of 'stuff' and Carol is very conscious of ..." Read More Average Rating: 4.9 out of 5 (based on 14 reviews) Sourced From About Us Garden Gate Needlepoint is your trusted source for needlepoint canvases both online and in-store. Since 1976 , we’ve been providing high-quality hand-painted canvases, fibers, and needlepoint accessories to needlepoint enthusiasts. We have informative in-person classes throughout the week. Your finished canvases can be framed to add to the beauty of your home, or if you prefer, finished by JRG Designs, our in-house finisher, who creates masterpieces exclusively for Garden Gate. We proudly carry quality supplies, including beautiful hand-painted canvasses, a wonderful selection of books and other supplies and, of course, an outstanding array of fibers. Garden Gate Needlepoint has been the cornerstone of all things needlepoint since 49 years and counting . Shop Needlepoint Canvases JOIN OUR MONTHLY EMAIL BLAST! Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Ring us up! We're THRILLED to address your queries or aid in your canvas hunt! Add Threads Stitch-to-finish Stitch-to-Finish is our signature innovation that combines stitching and finishing in one seamless experience. Each kit includes coordinated materials, guided instructions, and our patent-pending self-finishing system, allowing you to create a beautifully finished piece from the first stitch to the final detail—no professional finishing required. Do you want access to discounts and exclusive products? Sign up to receive text messages from KC Needlepoint! Click to sign up! About KC Needlepoint KC Needlepoint is your one stop needlepoint shop for all of your stitching needs! Whether you are a seasoned stitcher or are looking for your very first needlepoint project, you will be able to find something you love at KC Needlepoint. If you're looking to take the guesswork out of your next project, purchase one of our premade needlepoint kits, available in a variety of different skill levels. Alternatively, peruse through different canvas themes and choose from over 10,000 different designs available online. When you have picked out your canvas, we are ready to help you select threads from a variety of wools, silks, cottons and other specialty fibers to make your project truly one of a kind! When you have finished stitching your needlepoint project, contact us to discuss the wide range of finishing options we have to offer. No matter where you live, KC Needlepoint offers free USPS shipping on every order shipped within the United States. If you are local to the Kansas City area, swing by and visit us in our retail shop at 8050 Wornall Road.  We can't wait to help you find your next needlepoint project! Visit us at our retail needlepoint shop!
